name: RedDoorz Syariah @ Panglima Nyak Makam Aceh 2

reviews.originalComment: Cukup cocok untuk yang sedang mencari penginapan murah namun dengan kondisi kamar yg layak. Memang tidak mewah namun bagi saya sudah cukup dan sesuai dengan harganya yg terjangkau.
reviews.reviewComments: Quite suitable for those looking for affordable accommodation but with decent room conditions. It may not be luxurious, but for me, it is sufficient and in accordance with its affordable price.

reviews.reviewTitle: No vayáis, hay hoteles mucho mejores por un precio igual o menor. Hotel Prapat, por dar un ejemplo.
reviews.reviewPositives: El recepcionista me llevó a otro hotel pues se sentía mal con lo que pasó y me devolvió el dinero.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Te piden un 50% más por la habitación. Nada que ver con las fotos, tenía olor a humedad estaba asquerosa y la ventana daba al pasillo interior.

reviews.reviewComments: Bilik luas dan lokasi strategik kerana berhampiran dengan kedai makan. Namun, tuala mandi dan sabun mandi tidak disediakan, serta pintu bilik air tidak mempunyai kunci. Secara keseluruhan, penginapan ini selesa dan sesuai untuk penginapan ringkas

reviews.reviewTitle: Be Careful Misleading Price Between Agoda & Hotel
reviews.reviewComments:
The Man at the Reception asked 50 thousand  Rupiah more in Cash & I wasn’t given a Receipt. 
Agoda Price does not reflect the Price the Hotel charges. This is very misleading. Be careful when booking through Agoda as the price they ask at the Reception is different than what agoda charges.
The Man at the Reception said there is a Minimum Charge for the Twin Bedroom I booked which is 150 Thousand Rupiah 
Upon check in I was told the price I paid on Agoda is very low and that I had to pay more than what I paid on Agoda so I ended up paying 50 thousand Rupiah extra on top of What I paid Agoda.
The Future Guests should be aware of this Because of this Misleading Prices.
Also Blankets, Soap Shampoo were not provided. My travel Colleague did not like this and he went & slept elsewhere. 
For 150 thousand Rupiah you can find better Hotel.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar tdk sesuai dengan di aplikasi, tapi penjaga ramah butuh banyak perawatan dan penyegaran kamar nya
reviews.reviewComments: The room did not match what was shown in the application, but the staff were friendly and the room needed a lot of maintenance and refreshing.

reviews.originalComment: Udah bookinh kamar dan payment pas datang malah di refund uang bilang kamarnya full,dengan alasan lupa tutup aplikasi,di cek lagi apk nya tetap masih on.sangat tidak rekom
reviews.reviewComments: Already booked a room and made a payment, but upon arrival, my money was refunded saying the room was full, with the reason that they forgot to close the app. Checked again, and the app was still on. Very not recommended.

reviews.originalComment: Ga rekomendasi kita pesan kan potongan harganya dari voucher sampe ditempat staf minta tambahan biaya lagi, ga ada ramah ramahnya. Kalo emng ga sesuai sama di agoda kenapa ga cabut aja dari agoda dari pada ngescam pengunjung
reviews.reviewComments: I recommend that we order the discount from the voucher until we arrive at the place, and then the staff asks for additional fees again, there is no friendliness. If it doesn't match what is on Agoda, then why not just remove it from Agoda instead of scamming visitors?

reviews.originalComment:
Tidak tersedia fasilitas perlengkapan mandi.  
Kamar yg udah dibooking, malah dijual kepada orang lain. Ditawarkan untuk mengambil kamar lainnya, dengan syarat tambahan biaya.
reviews.reviewComments: No shower facilities available. The room that was already booked was sold to someone else. Offered to take another room, with the condition of additional charges.

reviews.reviewTitle: Worst Stay Experience: Never Book This Hotel!
reviews.originalTitle: Pengalaman Menginap Terburuk: Jangan Pernah Pesan Hotel Ini!
reviews.originalComment:
Pengalaman Menginap Terburuk: Jangan Pernah Pesan Hotel Ini!

Dengan sangat menyesal dan penuh kekecewaan, saya harus menyatakan bahwa menginap di RedDoorz Syariah @ Panglima Nyak Makam Aceh 2 adalah pengalaman paling buruk yang pernah saya alami. Saya memesan kamar untuk 4 orang seharga Rp225.000 melalui aplikasi Agoda. Namun, saat tiba dan check-in pada pukul 20.00, saya langsung dimintai tambahan Rp50.000 untuk kasur ekstra yang seharusnya tidak perlu. Ketika saya protes, staf hotel menanggapi saya dengan kurang sopan, padahal saya jelas-jelas memesan kamar untuk 4 orang sesuai dengan yang ditawarkan.

Ketika akhirnya masuk ke kamar, kondisi yang saya temui benar-benar tidak dapat diterima. Kamar mandi kotor dengan kloset yang bernoda dan lantai yang jorok. Tidak ada sabun atau fasilitas lain yang dijanjikan dalam iklan. Bau tidak sedap menyebar di seluruh kamar, dan ruangan penuh dengan nyamuk. AC yang seharusnya mendinginkan ruangan malah rusak dan membuat kamar terasa seperti oven. Kasur dan bantalnya terlihat sangat kotor, dengan warna kuning dan hitam yang menunjukkan bahwa kebersihan tidak pernah menjadi prioritas di tempat ini.

Pelayanan dari staf hotel sangat buruk dan tidak profesional. Ketika saya ingin check-out, saya harus menunggu lebih dari 10 menit karena petugasnya tampak tidak siap melayani. Ketika akhirnya dia bangun, dia keluar dengan wajah mengantuk dan tidak mengenakan baju, tanpa menunjukkan sikap profesional. Lebih parahnya, dia menyalahkan saya saat cekin karena memesan hotel ini dan menyebut bahwa pihak hotel tidak bertanggung jawab atas masalah yang ada karena Agoda hanya agen yang memberikan harga semena-mena. Pihak hotel juga menyalahkan Agoda, alih-alih bertanggung jawab langsung atas ketidaknyamanan ini. Sungguh pengalaman yang sangat memalukan dan menyakitkan.

Dengan harga Rp275.000 yang saya bayarkan, saya merasa sangat dirugikan dan ditipu. Harga sebesar itu bukanlah harga yang murah, dan dengan uang yang sama, saya bisa mendapatkan hotel lain yang jauh lebih baik dari segi fasilitas, pelayanan, dan profesionalisme petugasnya. Hotel ini adalah salah satu tempat terburuk yang pernah saya temui. Saya sangat menyarankan siapa pun yang berpikir untuk menginap di sini untuk membatalkan rencana mereka dan mencari tempat lain. Tempat ini tidak layak disebut hotel, apalagi dengan label "Syariah." Jauhi tempat ini untuk menghindari pengalaman menginap yang buruk dan perasaan tidak dihargai sebagai tamu.
reviews.reviewComments:
Worst Stay Experience: Never Book This Hotel!

With great regret and disappointment, I must express that staying at RedDoorz Syariah @ Panglima Nyak Makam Aceh 2 was the worst experience I have ever had. I booked a room for 4 people for IDR 225,000 through the Agoda app. However, upon arrival and check-in at 8:00 PM, I was immediately asked to pay an additional IDR 50,000 for an extra mattress that should not have been necessary. When I complained, the hotel staff responded to me rudely, even though I clearly booked a room for 4 people as offered.

When I finally entered the room, the condition I encountered was completely unacceptable. The bathroom was dirty with a stained toilet and filthy floor. There was no soap or other facilities promised in the advertisement. An unpleasant odor spread throughout the room, and the space was filled with mosquitoes. The air conditioning, which was supposed to cool the room, was broken and made the room feel like an oven. The mattress and pillows looked very dirty, with yellow and black colors indicating that cleanliness had never been a priority at this place.

The service from the hotel staff was extremely poor and unprofessional. When I wanted to check out, I had to wait over 10 minutes because the staff appeared unprepared to serve. When he finally woke up, he came out looking sleepy and not dressed, showing no professional attitude. Worse, he blamed me during check-out for booking this hotel and claimed that the hotel was not responsible for the issues because Agoda was merely an agent offering arbitrary prices. The hotel also blamed Agoda, instead of taking direct responsibility for this inconvenience. It was truly a humiliating and painful experience.

With the IDR 275,000 I paid, I felt very disadvantaged and cheated. That amount is not a cheap price, and with the same money, I could have gotten a much better hotel in terms of facilities, service, and the professionalism of the staff. This hotel is one of the worst places I have encountered. I strongly advise anyone thinking of staying here to cancel their plans and look for another place. This place does not deserve to be called a hotel, let alone labeled "Syariah." Stay away from this place to avoid a bad stay experience and feelings of being undervalued as a guest.

reviews.originalComment: Tempat penginapan paling jorok dan aneh dari tempat penginapan lain yang pernah saya nginap, keadaan suasana tempat tidak seperti yg di siarkan, dari luar ruangan sampai dalam kamar kotor dan bau, kain spre tidak di tukar ada kesan kotoran, tilam yang sangat sadis dan buruk, kamar tidur dan mandi berdebu jorok dan bersarang laba2, paling geram mau mandi air tiada, bisanya di salah kan sebab ada peyewa lain yg habiskan air di dalam bak storan air, betul gak masuk akal, lepas ni aku tidak mau sudah menginap di sini bikin sakit hati aja
reviews.reviewComments: The dirtiest and strangest accommodation I've ever stayed in compared to others, the atmosphere of the place is not as advertised, from the outside to the inside the room is dirty and smelly, the sheets are not changed and have stains, the mattress is very harsh and bad, the bedroom and bathroom are dusty, dirty, and infested with spiders, the most frustrating part is wanting to shower but there's no water, usually blamed on other tenants who used up all the water in the storage tank, it really doesn't make sense, after this I don't want to stay here anymore, it's just frustrating.
bisa lah

reviews.reviewTitle: The accommodation is highly not recommended.
reviews.originalComment: Penginapan sangat tdk rekomendasi. Kamar pengap  kondsi penginapa tdk bersih debu di mana2. Air kamar mandi tdk ada. Suasana tdk nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: The accommodation is highly unrecommended. The room is stuffy, and the condition of the lodging is not clean, with dust everywhere. There is no water in the bathroom. The atmosphere is uncomfortable.

reviews.originalComment: Kami di tolak begitu sanpai di hotel jam 10 malam, alasannya agoda sistemnya eror. Dan uang kami dikembalikan. Sangat tidak koperatif
reviews.reviewComments: We were rejected upon arrival at the hotel at 10 PM, the reason being Agoda's system error. And our money was refunded. Very uncooperative.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel sangat buruk sekali..terburuk dan terkotor berdebu..tidak direkomendasikan...hotel paling buruk yg ada di banda aceh
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is very bad... the worst and dirtiest, dusty... not recommended... the worst hotel in Banda Aceh.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat tidak rekomendasi karena ada biaya tambahan di luar harga yang tertera di aplikasi
reviews.reviewComments: Highly not recommended because there are additional costs outside the price listed in the app.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat bagus dan sesuai dengan harga
reviews.reviewComments: Very good and worth the price.

reviews.originalComment: Tolong kebersihan & kamar diutamakan, sprei sudah kotor masih juga dipakai
reviews.reviewComments: Please prioritize cleanliness & the room, the sheets are already dirty but still being used.

reviews.originalComment: Kurang Profesional dalam fasilitas dan  system pelayanan
reviews.reviewComments: Less professional in facilities and service systems.

reviews.originalComment: Penginapan...handuk aja gak tersedia
reviews.reviewComments: Accommodation...only towels are not available.

reviews.originalComment: Kasur pada rusak sprei ga diganti air susah
reviews.reviewComments: The mattress is damaged, the sheets aren't changed, and it's hard to get the water out.

reviews.originalComment: Kelengkapan kamar yg minus
reviews.reviewComments: Missing room amenities

reviews.originalComment:
Handuk tidak ada, udah saya minta pun enggak ada, kamar mandi bau dan banyak jaring laba2, closet duduknya tidak ada tempat dudukannya, gmn saya mau BAB jika ga ada tempat dudukannya,  

Tempat parkir oke, tapi jalan masuk parkiran tidak di jaga oleh pemilik, jadi saat ada motor banyak di pintu masuk, saya harus pindahin sendiri karena memang tidak ada yang menjaga disitu, cukup sekali saya menginap disitu

Kalo yang menginap untuk keluarga ato berkelompok sangat tidak di sarankan

Kecuali untuk wisatawan tunggal dan hanya butuh tempat untuk tidur untuk semalam saja dan tidak membawa kendaraan pribadi, itu boleh2 saja karena tempatnya dekat dengan kuliner dan supermarket
reviews.reviewComments:
There were no towels, even though I asked for them, the bathroom smelled and had a lot of spider webs, the toilet seat was missing, how am I supposed to use the toilet if there is no seat?

The parking space is okay, but the entrance to the parking is not monitored by the owner, so when there are a lot of motorcycles at the entrance, I have to move them myself because there is no one to manage it, I will only stay there once.

I do not recommend this place for families or groups.

Unless it's for solo travelers who only need a place to sleep for one night and do not bring a private vehicle, that would be acceptable because the location is close to food places and supermarkets.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar jorok dan bau tidak sesuai dengan gambar
reviews.reviewComments: The room is dirty and smells, unlike the picture.
Pelayanannya sudah baik tapi fasilitas perlu di tingkatkan kembali
Sudah pedan dan bayar diaplikasi, kamarnya full. Tidak bisa refund.
Tidak ramah
hmmm spiclses
Harga tidak sesuai dengan fasilitas
Nyaman
Kecewa dengan pelayanannya sudah di booking dan dibayar sampai tempat penuh kamarnya katanya, dikasi kamar yang tidak sesuai dan masih kotor dan penambahan uang kamar

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel paling buruk di Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Kamar nya jorok, pegawai nya cuek, hal yg paling saya geram sudah di booking bs di jual ke manual, hotel paling terkotor , fuck , tidak rekomendasi buat wisata lokal luar lokal
